opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I slipped and put my arm through the glass coffee table, it's a deep cut and it won't stop bleeding.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It happened about 45 minutes ago in a fall at home and it's still bleeding through a towel even though I've been pressing on it. I'm worried about how much blood I've lost and whether I need to go to hospital.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 45 minutes ago when I slipped and my forearm went through a glass coffee table
symptom_narrative.character: a deep cut on the inside of my left forearm that stings and burns, with the skin gaping open
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: it looks nasty and there's a lot of blood, but if I press hard on it the bleeding slows down
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the inside of my left forearm, between the wrist and elbow
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant ooze that eases when I press firmly and starts again when I let go
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: pressing on it hard with a folded towel
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving my arm or letting go of the pressure
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I can still feel and move all my fingers, but I feel anxious and a bit shaky from the sight of the blood
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't use the arm for anything because I have to keep pressing on it the whole time

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: the fall happened at home; there is broken glass on the living room floor; my spouse is here with me

objective_data_offered.value: a roughly 6 cm straight cut on the inner left forearm with the edges gaping open, oozing dark blood into a folded towel
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: seen over video only; true depth and whether anything is caught inside the wound cannot be judged remotely

objective_data_offered.value: steady dark ooze that soaks slowly into the towel and slows right down when firm pressure is applied — no spurting or bright-red pumping
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: spouse's description, not a clinician assessment of the bleeding

objective_data_offered.value: I can still feel all my fingers and move them normally, they aren't cold or blue
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-report — not a formal examination of sensation, tendon function or capillary refill
